info.title: GizClaw Client API
info.description: Local HTTP API exposed by GizClaw client commands such as the Play UI.

get.summary: List resource names exposed to the current peer
List workspaces readable by the current peer
List workflows readable by the current peer
List models readable by the current peer
List credentials readable by the current peer
List firmwares readable by the current peer
List voices readable by the current peer
List pets owned by the current peer

post.summary: Adopt a pet for the current peer

get.summary: Get a pet owned by the current peer

put.summary: Update a pet owned by the current peer

delete.summary: Delete a pet owned by the current peer

post.summary: Feed a pet owned by the current peer
Wash a pet owned by the current peer
Play with a pet owned by the current peer

get.summary: Get the current peer wallet

200.description: The wallet for the current peer.

get.summary: List wallet transactions for the current peer
Get a wallet transaction for the current peer
List rewards for the current peer
Get a reward for the current peer

post.summary: Claim a reward for the current peer

get.summary: Stream playable voices as server-sent events

200.description: Server-sent voice events. Each event data field is a PlayVoiceStreamEvent JSON object.

get.summary: List OpenAI-compatible voices readable by the current peer

200.description: A page of voices exposed through the local OpenAI-compatible proxy.

post.summary: Create a WebRTC answer for a browser offer

get.summary: List friends for the current peer
List contacts for the current peer

post.summary: Create a contact for the current peer

get.summary: Get a contact for the current peer

put.summary: Update a contact for the current peer

delete.summary: Delete a contact for the current peer

post.summary: Add a friend by invite token

get.summary: Get the current peer friend invite token

200.description: The active invite token when present.

post.summary: Create or refresh the current peer friend invite token

delete.summary: Clear the current peer friend invite token
Delete a friend relation for the current peer

get.summary: List friend groups for the current peer

post.summary: Create a friend group for the current peer
Join a friend group by invite token

200.description: The joined group and caller membership.

get.summary: Get a friend group visible to the current peer

put.summary: Update a friend group visible to the current peer

delete.summary: Delete a friend group visible to the current peer

get.summary: Get a friend group invite token

200.description: The active invite token when present.

post.summary: Create or refresh a friend group invite token

delete.summary: Clear a friend group invite token

get.summary: List friend group members

200.description: A page of friend group members.

put.summary: Update a friend group member role

get.summary: Get the active Play UI workspace runtime state

put.summary: Set the active Play UI workspace

get.summary: Get the selected Play UI workspace definition

put.summary: Update the selected Play UI workspace definition

post.summary: Reload the active Play UI workspace runtime

put.summary: Set the selected Play UI workspace input mode

get.summary: List history for the active Play UI workspace

200.description: A page of workspace history entries.

post.summary: Replay one active workspace history entry through the runtime stream

get.summary: Get active workspace memory statistics
List workspace history for a visible workspace

200.description: A page of workspace history entries.

get.summary: Get one workspace history entry
Get one workspace history audio asset
